titel: Joint press statement by Commissioner Šefčovič and Minister Wang.
html:
Statement from the European Commission Brussels, June 29, 2026

On June 29, 2026, Mr. Maros Šefčovič, a member of the European Commission responsible for trade and economic security, as well as institutional relations and transparency, and Mr. Wang Wenta...
tldr: Representatives from the European Union and a Chinese minister have jointly signed a document on trade and economics, aiming to clarify cooperation between Europe and China.
lattlast:
The European Commission, the executive branch of the EU, has jointly issued a statement with a Chinese minister. The two leaders met to discuss trade and how economic activity can operate safely between the countries.

In the document signed on June 29, 2026, they focus on issues related to economics and transparency, meaning that processes should be made more open. The aim is to establish clearer rules for how Europe and China will cooperate in the future.

Both Maros Šefčovič from the EU and Wang Wenta from China have agreed to these common points. This represents an important step towards improving relations between the two major regions.
